examples: I was embarrassed how to punish him when I discovered his part in the business: he's such a cobweb, a pinch would annihilate him.
This also explains why matter and antimatter annihilate.
Are you allowed to annihilate your trees if you're just renting?
WIMPs met (which should happen quite frequently in the centre of the earth) they would annihilate one another.
"When I get Cleverly in the ring I'm going to annihilate him, " said the 27-year-old Bellew, known as 'Bomber'.
